text:
EXPLANATION: RDKit is an open-source software project, not an academic paper, and its official website explicitly states there is no official RDKit publication. The recommended citation format provided by the project is simply the project name and its URL.
LINK: https://www.rdkit.org
FOUND_TITLE: NONE
FOUND_AUTHORS: NONE
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
